title: poa glauca var. strictior
intro: Poa glauca var. strictior, also known as Blue Fescue Grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Poa glauca var. strictior include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
